mainEntity.name: What compensation for traumatic brain injury from machine fall in West Jordan?
mainEntity.text: What compensation for traumatic brain injury from machine fall in West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical care, temporary disability wages (66.67% avg earnings), permanent impairment rating, and possible total disability benefits.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: TBI from machinery often yields high impairment ratings (20-50%+), plus lifelong therapy. Utah caps some benefits but allows hearing for extras. Document cognitive losses. West Jordan attorneys fight undervaluation.[1][4]

name: TBI Compensation in Machine Accidents
description: Medical care, temporary disability wages (66.67% avg earnings), permanent impairment rating, and possible total disability benefits.[4]
